role: Dev-loop governance: mock services (mock_feishu / mock_cc / mock_cc_worker / mock_mcp_ctl), per-iteration loopguard (LG-1..LG-11), verify_* static gates, ledger append helper, and the SHA-pinned external verdict final_gate.sh (v2, 13 checks).

entry_points.final_gate: scripts/final_gate.sh:1 — SHA-pinned external verdict; 13 checks; default --mock or --lark mode
entry_points.ledger_append: scripts/ledger_append.py:1 — enum-dispatched evidence commands + ledger row append
entry_points.mock_cc_worker_ws: scripts/mock_cc_worker.py:39 — Phoenix ChannelChannel client for final_gate L1/L2/L6
entry_points.mock_mcp_ctl: scripts/mock_mcp_ctl.py:20 — one-shot tool_invoke over ChannelChannel WS

final_gate_v2_checks_13.check: make test (full Elixir + Python unit tests)
verify_prd_matrix.py — every PRD FR row resolves to a real test file
loopguard.sh — LG-1..LG-11 incl. SHA pins on final_gate.sh + loopguard-bundle.sha256
esr scenario run e2e-esr-channel (mock scenario, full adapter+handler fan-out)
verify_prd_acceptance.py --manifest — every required acceptance row ticked (LG-5)
grep docs/ralph-loop-ledger.md for <promise>BLOCKED: (no loop-failure promise left)
L0 — start esrd without manual adapter add; asserts feishu adapter + feishu-app peer auto-restored from adapters.yaml (P7)
L0 — esr workspace add esr-dev (role=diagnostic) registers the workspace for /new-session
L1 — post '/new-session esr-dev tag=$tag'; expect bot reply 'session $tag ready' + esrd log 'actor_id=cc:$tag'
L2 — post 'ECHO-PROBE: $nonce'; expect bot reply containing $nonce + esrd log 'tool_invoke _echo args.nonce="$nonce"'
L5 — esr cmd stop feishu-thread-session; expect esrd log 'session_killed published session_id=$tag' + tmux window gone
L6 — parallel @${tag}-a vs @${tag}-b isolation: sub-nonce visible only in a's mock_cc log, never in b's
verdict — print nonce/round-trip timing; optional courtesy message to real Lark chat

loopguard_lg_checks_11.what: scenario YAML well-formed + live-signature (rejects banned keys, defanging patterns, weak regex)
AST non-empty-body check on manifest of 14 entry fns (adapter_runner.run, handler_worker.run, cli main _submit_*, runtime_bridge.call_runtime) — rejects pass/NotImplementedError/cheap-log-only bodies
scans Acceptance section for banned phrases: defer/manual step/post-install/gated by/live hookup/v0.2+/todo/pending
final_gate.sh SHA pin — loop is forbidden to modify
git-log ledger: rows only appended, evidence-type in enum {unit_tests,prd_matrix,loopguard,scenario_mock,final_gate_mock,prd_acceptance,ledger_check}
new/modified CLI tests since baseline use esrd_fixture/live_esrd fixture
no _submit_* monkeypatch in tests (AST walks decorators + Call args/kwargs; catches @patch / mocker.patch.object)
SHA pin on loopguard core (loopguard.sh + 7 verify scripts + live_signatures.txt + acceptance-manifest.yaml)

routes.what: bot→chat send; returns Lark-shaped {code:0,data:{message_id:om_mock_...}} and records to _sent_messages
WS upgrade; feishu adapter connects here for inbound events
scenario helper — inject P2ImMessageReceiveV1 envelope to every connected WS client
scenario helper — JSON of recorded outbound messages for grep-style assertions

mock_feishu.py.scenarios_enabled: e2e-esr-channel scenario steps; final_gate.sh v2 checks 9/10/12 (L1/L2/L6); feishu adapter conformance tests via adapters/feishu/tests/fixtures/live-capture/*.json

mock_cc.py.protocol: prints '[esr-cc] ready' on start; for each stdin line prints '[esr-cc] echo: <line>'
mock_cc.py.scenarios_enabled: cc_tmux adapter sentinel-parsing round-trip; scenarios/e2e-feishu-cc.yaml tmux_proxy init_directive start_cmd (via scripts/e2e-cc.sh)

mock_cc_worker.py.interface: Phoenix Channels v2 WebSocket client → ws://127.0.0.1:4001/channel/socket
mock_cc_worker.py.behaviour: joins cli:channel/<session_id>; envelope session_register; retries 'session <sid> ready' tool_invoke until peer ack; handles ECHO-PROBE notifications → tool_invoke _echo with nonce
mock_cc_worker.py.scenarios_enabled: final_gate.sh L1 (ready reply), L2 (_echo round-trip), L6 (parallel session_a vs session_b isolation)

mock_mcp_ctl.py.interface: one-shot Phoenix ChannelChannel WS → tool_invoke → tool_result
mock_mcp_ctl.py.scenarios_enabled: scenarios/e2e-esr-channel.yaml — invokes a named tool with a JSON args blob and prints the tool_result envelope

verify_prd_matrix.py.validates: docs/superpowers/prds/0[1-7]-*.md unit-test matrix rows — each |FR|test-file|name| row resolves to an existing file (handles ::testname, 'per-handler...' fallback to test_handlers_cross_cutting.py, '—'/'same' placeholders)

verify_prd_acceptance.py.validates: --manifest: every row in acceptance-manifest.yaml appears as '- [x] ...' in the matching PRD's ## Acceptance section (LG-5). --regex-scan: no banned deferral phrases in Acceptance (LG-3).

verify_ledger_append_only.py.validates: git log of docs/ralph-loop-ledger.md — no commit deletes rows, no commit edits a prior row in place, every new row's evidence-type is in APPROVED_EVIDENCE_TYPES enum

verify_cli_tests_live.py.validates: CLI test files added/modified since .ralph-loop-baseline — each test_* function has esrd_fixture/live_esrd arg; with --no-monkeypatch, no _submit_* string literal or attribute appears in decorator or function-body Call args/kwargs

verify_entry_bodies.py.validates: DEFAULT_MANIFEST of 14 functions has non-stub bodies — rejects empty/pass, NotImplementedError raise, {'error':'not yet wired'} sentinel, all-cheap-stmt bodies (logger.*/print/getLogger/Constant assigns). AST-based.

loopguard_infra_summary: scripts/loopguard.sh:1 runs 11 checks sequentially; on first failure prints 'loopguard FAIL — <id>' and the BLOCKED promise tag that downstream final_gate.sh 6b/13 searches for in the ledger. Two SHA pins (final_gate.sh.sha256 at LG-4, loopguard-bundle.sha256 at LG-11) ensure the loop cannot silently mutate governance files. scripts/live_signatures.txt declares 6 approved stdout signatures (sig-A BEAM pid, sig-B actor_id, sig-C ack_ms, sig-D Lark message_id, sig-E PeerRegistry state, sig-F dedup hit) that LG-1 requires as literal substrings inside scenario expect_stdout_match regexes — blocks defanging alternations like '|.*'.

support_scripts.spawn_worker.sh: scripts/spawn_worker.sh — detach one worker process; print pid; used by Esr.WorkerSupervisor
support_scripts.spawn_scenario_workers.sh: scripts/spawn_scenario_workers.sh — per-thread cc_tmux adapter + shared feishu adapter + feishu_thread/cc_session/tmux_proxy handler workers; writes /tmp/esr-worker-*.pid
support_scripts.kill_scenario_workers.sh: scripts/kill_scenario_workers.sh — SIGTERM all /tmp/esr-worker-*.pid then SIGKILL pgrep survivors
support_scripts.esrd.sh: scripts/esrd.sh — start/stop/status of $ESRD_HOME/<instance>/esrd.pid; ESRD_CMD_OVERRIDE for tests; smoke-* instances get aggressive cleanup of /tmp/esr-worker-* and ~/.esrd/default/adapters.yaml
support_scripts.e2e-cc.sh: scripts/e2e-cc.sh — tmux session start_cmd; prints '[esr-cc] session=$name' sentinel then execs mock_cc.py
support_scripts.esr-cc.sh: scripts/esr-cc.sh — real CC launcher: reads workspaces.yaml, renders .mcp.json with esr-channel MCP server config, execs claude with --resume + --permission-mode bypassPermissions + --settings roles/<role>/settings.json
support_scripts.esr-cc.local.sh.example: scripts/esr-cc.local.sh.example — gitignored local override template (proxy vars, ESR_ESRD_URL)
support_scripts.ledger_append.py: scripts/ledger_append.py — enum-dispatched evidence (7 types); runs mapped cmd, takes sha256 prefix of stdout, appends new |iter|date|phase|FR|commit|type|sha| row

fixtures_and_data.scripts/loopguard-bundle.sha256: pins: loopguard.sh + loopguard_scenario.py + loopguard_scenarios_allowlist.py + verify_entry_bodies.py + verify_prd_acceptance.py + verify_cli_tests_live.py + verify_ledger_append_only.py + ledger_append.py + live_signatures.txt + acceptance-manifest.yaml (LG-11)
fixtures_and_data.scripts/live_signatures.txt: 6 approved regex signatures (sig-A..sig-F) for LG-1 substring match
fixtures_and_data.scripts/tests/fixtures/scenarios/good.ya: valid scenario — sig-B substring inside regex
fixtures_and_data.scripts/tests/fixtures/prds/good/01-acto: valid PRD with both required rows ticked
fixtures_and_data.scripts/tests/fixtures/entry_bodies/stub: pass body + {'error':'not yet wired'} dict — fails LG-2
fixtures_and_data.scripts/tests/fixtures/cli_tests/good.py: uses esrd_fixture; no monkeypatch — passes LG-9/10

failures.reason: Fixture writes only e2e-feishu-cc.yaml; loopguard_scenarios_allowlist.py ALLOWED now requires both {e2e-feishu-cc.yaml, e2e-esr-channel.yaml}. Test is stale w.r.t. v0.2-channel allowlist expansion at scripts/loopguard_scenarios_allowlist.py:8.
failures.classification: test-outdated (production code updated for v0.2, test fixture not updated)

known_gaps: test_loopguard_scenarios_allowlist.py::test_exactly_one_allowed_file_passes asserts single-file allowlist but scripts/loopguard_scenarios_allowlist.py:8 now requires both v0.1 and v0.2-channel scenarios — fixture needs to write both YAMLs.

verify_cli_tests_live.py._tests_added_since_baseline (scripts/verify_cli_tests_live.py:57) only matches py/tests/test_cli_cmd_*.py glob — tests in py/tests/test_cli_*.py outside that glob are not checked.
mock_feishu push_inbound does not yet populate parent_id (scripts/tests/test_mock_feishu_conformance.py:115-124 flags this as v0.2 gap).
cross_module_refs: scripts/loopguard-bundle.sha256 pins docs/superpowers/prds/acceptance-manifest.yaml — any PRD update invalidates LG-11
scripts/final_gate.sh invokes runtime test + esr scenario run + uv run esr commands → runtime/ + py/ + scenarios/
scripts/spawn_scenario_workers.sh boots py modules esr.ipc.adapter_runner and esr.ipc.handler_worker against ws://127.0.0.1:4001 hubs served by runtime/
